footer.tagline: Free, accurate, AI-assisted calculators for finance, health, construction, math and everyday life.
home.hero_subtitle: One place for finance, health, construction and everyday math — instant, accurate, and explained by AI.
home.quick.title: Try a Quick One
home.quick.open_full: Open the full :name calculator with AI insight
home.how.title: Find your calculator in 10 seconds
home.how.intro: No signup needed. Search or browse a category, run the numbers, and read the AI insight under every result.
home.how.step1_body: Type a fuzzy term like “loan emi”, “bmi”, or “tip” — the live search jumps you straight to the right tool.
home.how.step2_body: Browse finance, health, tax and more — :categories categories with :calculators free calculators.
home.how.step3_body: Every result comes with a plain-English explanation so you know what the number means — not just what it is.
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to save calculations and unlock more tools.
auth.register_subtitle: Join to save work, get AI explanations, and access more tools.
auth.name: Name
cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to run the site. With your OK, we also use advertising cookies (including Google AdSense) to fund free calculators.
calc.placeholder: Fill in the form and click Calculate to see your result here.
about.meta_description: Learn about AI Calculator Hub: free calculators for finance, construction, climate, tax, health and Nepal — with transparent formulas and practical guides.
about.hero_subtitle: AI Calculator Hub is an independent tools platform that helps people make better everyday decisions with transparent formulas, worked examples, and optional AI explanations.
about.who_p1: Most online calculators show a result without explaining the method, units, or assumptions. We build free tools where every input is clear, every formula is documented, and FAQs catch the questions people actually ask.
about.who_p2: We operate from Kathmandu, Nepal, and serve users worldwide — from homeowners estimating materials to founders modeling tax and energy costs. Accurate tools, plain language, no unnecessary friction.
about.coverage_empty: Categories will appear here once calculators are published.
about.mission_body: Make accurate, transparent calculations free and accessible — so students, homeowners, builders, and professionals can decide with confidence.
about.build_body: Each tool documents its approach, common inputs, and FAQs. We prefer standard industry methods and update calculators when formulas or local rules change.
about.trust_body: We may show ads (including Google AdSense) to keep tools free. Ads never change calculator math. See our :privacy and :cookies.
about.standards_p1: Calculator outputs are informational. They are not a substitute for licensed engineering, medical, legal, tax, or financial advice. When a decision is high-stakes, verify with a qualified professional in your jurisdiction.
about.standards_p2: Found an error or have a tool request? Feedback helps us improve accuracy for everyone.
